creator: asami@cs.berkeley.edu
text:
* This exactly what I get.

Ok.

 * Which mirror site do you want me to try? And which version (2.2.2,
 * 2.2-stable or -current)?

Well, whichever mirror site is fine but these are the original checksums:

MD5 (packages-2.2.2/x11/xview-lib-3.2.1.tgz) = 2fff30d0d0ae40b2de9fbe1ed0110058
MD5 (packages-current/x11/xview-lib-3.2.1.tgz) = 11a6cb4b08aa8138a40e72c21a986587

I would like you to try both, on whatever systems you have, if it's
not too much trouble for you.

Satoshi
